text: Yukon Handyman completely transformed our kitchen. The team was professional, punctual, and the craftsmanship is outstanding. Our dream kitchen became a reality.
Had our metal roof installed last fall. Handled the Yukon weather like champs. The snow guards have already proven their worth. Highly recommend.
The LVP flooring they installed is incredible. Heated floors in a Yukon winter are a game changer. Fair pricing and immaculate work.
Reliable snow removal service all winter. Never missed a morning. Our commercial lot was always clear before opening.
Our bathroom renovation exceeded expectations. The tile work is museum-quality. They respected our timeline and budget perfectly.
Called them for an emergency roof repair during a blizzard. They showed up within hours and had it sorted. True Yukon grit.
Post-construction cleaning was thorough and detailed. Our new home was spotless for move-in. Wouldn't trust anyone else.
